prompt: a realistic ultrasound image of a fetus based on the reference mask, showing typical fetal features and grayscale texture.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic ultrasound image of a fetus. Using image 1 as a reference mask, fill the white fan-shaped area with a realistic depiction of a fetus, including typical anatomical features and a detailed grayscale texture. Preserve the black background, vertical scale on the left, and vertical bar on the top right from image 1 to create an authentic diagnostic ultrasound display.
objects: Detailed grayscale texture within the fan-shaped area
Vertical bar on the top right
